lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, who are you?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Why, I'm Trader Stan, owner and operator of the largest fleet of trading ships and chartered vessels to ever sail the seas!

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: If you want to get to a port in a hurry then you can charter one of my ships to take you there - if the price is right...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, where exactly can I go with your ships?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: We run ships from Port Phasmatys over to Port Tyras, stopping at Port Sarim, Catherby, Brimhaven, Musa Point, Port Khazard and more besides!

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: We might dock at Mos Le'Harmless once in a while, as well, if you catch my meaning...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, that's a lot of ports. I take it you have some exotic stuff to trade?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: We certainly do! I and my crewmen have access to items bought and sold from around the world. Would you like to take a look? Or would you like to charter a ship?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, let's see what you're trading.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I would like to charter a ship.

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Certainly [sir/madam]. Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Sorry, we can't take you anywhere if you are trying to smuggle that rum.

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Sorry, we aren't a laundry ship. You'll need to leave those dirty bedsheets behind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you let me bring it if I told you it was a security blanket?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: No, then we would just mock you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I see.

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Is that your bedsheet covered in filthy slime?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can say in all honesty that it is not.

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Well, whoever it belongs to, it's not coming on this ship!

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Why do you want to travel to a port you are already at? Do you want to travel somewhere else?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Crandor? Are you crazy?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: No charter ship would take you to that island. You'd need to buy your own ship and, even then, you'd have trouble finding a captain crazy enough to go there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any paints for sale?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Paint? I suppose I could part with some of my amazing gold Merchant's paint for the right price...

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: I tell you what, if you bring me 5 different tradeable paints, I'll trade them for a bucket of my Merchant's paint.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 5 tradeable paints on me right now.

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Then I suggest you get trading. And don't bother bringing me any paints you can't trade yourself, I can't trade them either!

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, who are you?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, let's see what you're trading.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I would like to charter a ship.

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: Certainly [sir/madam]. Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: This is a Sailing Alpha, find out how to get there yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Trader Stan
lines.text: This is a Sailing Alpha, find out how to get there yourself!
